ticket: I've been trying to reset my password for an hour. The reset email never arrives even after multiple attempts. This is blocking our whole team.
My latest invoice shows the wrong amount — I was charged for 10 seats but we only have 6.
Someone just logged into my account from a device in another country that I don't recognise.
Do you have a Spanish-language version of the mobile app on the roadmap for this year?

Production is completely down for all of our users and we are losing revenue every minute. Please escalate immediately.
I'm honestly delighted with the new reporting feature — it saved my team hours this week. Thank you!
Please close my account and delete all of my data under GDPR. I no longer use the service.

The CSV export button does nothing when I click it — no download, no error, nothing happens.
